methodology.model: Event-based rule-driven OSINT threat intelligence model.

event_subtypes.incident: Reported operational event such as drone incident, cyberattack, sabotage, border event or GPS interference.
event_subtypes.activity: Security or military activity shaping the threat environment.
event_subtypes.assessment: Strategic, institutional or analytical background. It is not counted into the operational threat index.

methodology.warning: This dashboard is an OSINT monitoring aid. It does not confirm attribution and should not be treated as an official threat assessment.
